Vivian Ng Photography is a Vancouver-based wedding photographer specializing in heartfelt and exquisite imagery. Vivian captures emotionally resonant, intimate photographs that allow couples to relive the joy and emotion of their wedding day, creating a beautiful visual legacy of your celebration.
